positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized celestial forest scene. The main subject is a glowing, intricate root system intertwined with bioluminescent flora, forming a central, mandala-like composition. Include glowing crystalline butterflies and crescent moons orbiting the central structure. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with Synthwave vaporwave aesthetics. Use deep indigo, vibrant electric teal, soft lilac, and warm gold accents. The overall mood should be mystical and highly detailed, optimized for central, continuous apparel printing. Clean silhouettes, strong contrast, high saturation, deep depth of field, highly decorative linework, vector illustration quality.
